query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.phone, c.email, COUNT(q.id) as quotationCount FROM clients c LEFT JOIN quotations q ON c.id = q.clientId WHERE c.name LIKE '%Lina%' OR c.name LIKE '%Paez%' GROUP BY c.id
